message:
test(hooks): fix flaky waitFor conditions in coverage tests (#9340)

Replace waitFor(() => !isLoading) with data-driven conditions that
wait for actual state changes. isLoading can start as false when a
cached snapshot is present, causing the condition to resolve before
the async operation completes.

Also fix settledWithConcurrency mock in useIntoto tests to add .catch
handling so rejected promises surface as { status: 'rejected' } entries
instead of propagating through Promise.all.

Signed-off-by: Andy Anderson <andy@clubanderson.com>
Signed-off-by: Andrew Anderson <andy@clubanderson.com>
